basic_details.short_information: Central University of Jharkhand (CUJ) Library Trainee Notification 2026 has been released on 07 July 2026 on the official website cuj.ac.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the CUJ Library Trainee Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters in Library & Information Science (MLISc) or equivalent from recognized University/institute with first class and consistently good academic record.
qualification.details: Masters in Library & Information Science (MLISc) or equivalent from recognized University/institute with first class and consistently good academic record.

content_sections.heading: CUJ Library Trainee Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CUJ Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CUJ Library Trainee Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CUJ Library Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
CUJ Library Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Masters in Library & Information Science (MLISc) or equivalent from recognized University/institute with first class and consistently good academic record.

content_sections.heading: CUJ Library Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
CUJ Library Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
CUJ Library Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
CUJ Library Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for CUJ Library Trainee Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: CUJ Library Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CUJ Library Trainee posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Library Trainee posts at Central University of Jharkhand is scheduled for 14th July 2026. Candidates should ensure they are present at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Library Trainee position?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Library Trainee position, candidates must possess a Masters in Library & Information Science (MLISc) or an equivalent degree from a recognized university with a first-class academic record.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Library Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Library Trainee position is 28 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Library Trainee role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Library Trainee position will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 15,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Library Trainee post?
faq.answer: Central University of Jharkhand has announced a total of 3 vacancies for the Library Trainee position in its recent recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the CUJ Library Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for the Library Trainee posts at Central University of Jharkhand, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Library Trainee posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Library Trainee posts will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates are advised to be prepared for both stages.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the Central University of Jharkhand (CUJ) office, located in Ranchi, Jharkhand, with the pincode 835222.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including educational certificates, ID proof, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Library Trainee position at Central University of Jharkhand is a contractual job. The appointment will be on a contract basis for a specified period.
